Note: : Alongside wharf Navy Yard Boston Top of Page: Mercurial barometer 8.5 ft above the level. being .06' high.
1005: Got Underway. Cast off from Navy Yard Dock. Came to with starboard anchor in 9 fine soft bottom ...
0000: Mercurial Barometer sent ashore for comparison. No Baro or TA readings from hour 9 to hour 15.

Other: 1800: Temperature after 6:pm affected by warm air from wardroom hatch.

Note: Noon: Navy Yard, Charlestown, Mass. No indication of when he moved back to the Navy Yard.

Ice_Log: 0400-0800: Unusually cold. Ice forming all about surface of water
0800-Noon: River covered with soft slush and ice backed up on flood tide. River freezing from ice on ebb.

Note: The pressure here takes a rather unbelievable fall, but I don't know how to fix it.
1100: Swinging ship in Massachusetts bay between Minot's Ledge and Boston Lt
1320: Got Underway. Minots Ledge lt brg (P.C.) SSW 3/4 W and. Boston lt WxN 1/4 N 1320: shaped a course ExS 1/4 S by standard compass
